accepted.reason: Masked PSNR image-quality computation is a compact pixel-loop numeric kernel.
Kendall tau pairwise concordance counting provides strong nested-loop statistics patterns.
Radial bin accumulation over 2D arrays is a practical signal/image processing kernel.
Pure nested-loop compute kernel is useful low-level optimization exercise material.
Grid-based right-triangle counting is a clear combinatorial geometry loop workload.
Batched primality checks over contiguous numeric arrays are solid conversion targets.
Policy-tree value accumulation over state/action/observation models is a strong planning kernel pattern.
Heritability and normalization helper loops provide scientific-statistics numeric workload examples.

skipped.reason: Mostly tutorial/demo snippets with limited standalone kernel value.
External library callback wrapper plumbing is too binding-specific for unpaired optimization training.
